currentMonth.label: March 2026
currentMonth.summary: Strong momentum building with comprehensive content strategy and technical optimizations. The blog strategy is paying off with January's LA local SEO post now ranking #11. Focus on doubling down on content and launching Reddit/Quora strategy.
currentMonth.strategy: Content velocity acceleration and social platform expansion to build topical authority and drive qualified traffic

tasks.task: Published comprehensive Google Business Profile guide
tasks.subtasks: 3,200-word guide targeting 'google business profile optimization' (vol: 1,900) and 'gbp los angeles' (vol: 320), indexed within 48 hours

tasks.task: Complete SEO vs PPC blog post
tasks.subtasks: Draft complete targeting 'seo vs ppc' (vol: 2,400), in final review phase
Implemented WebP images sitewide, added resource hints for third-party scripts, mobile speed score improved from 72 to 89
Content plan for 10 Reddit threads across r/smallbusiness, r/entrepreneur, r/digital_marketing; 3 Quora answers published with blog links
Testing new metas based on Search Console CTR data - /seo-services (1.2% CTR) and /web-design (0.8% CTR)

pastMonths.label: February 2026
pastMonths.summary: Strong month with two high-performing blog posts published and significant backlink acquisition. Case study became the #2 organic landing page and is ranking for 12 keywords.

tasks.task: Published SEO mistakes blog targeting LA startups
tasks.subtasks: 1,800 words targeting 'seo mistakes startups' (vol: 720), ranking #18 after 2 weeks
2,400 words with real data and screenshots, ranking for 12 keywords including 'seo case study' #19, generating 45 clicks/week
Added FAQ schema to 5 service pages (3 rich snippets generated), Article schema to blog posts, updated LocalBusiness schema
3 new referring domains: DesignRush guest post (DA 72), StartupLA newsletter mention (DA 45), Reddit AMA generating 200 referral visits
Added mobile sticky CTA (35% increase in form views), simplified contact form from 7 to 4 fields, 22% increase in form submissions

notableWins: seo agency los angeles moved from #34 to #28

pastMonths.label: January 2026
pastMonths.summary: Focused on on-page optimization for core service pages and published first high-performing blog post. Successfully moved primary keyword from #47 to #34 through on-page changes alone.

tasks.task: On-page SEO optimization for 5 service pages
tasks.subtasks: Optimized /seo-services, /web-design, /social-media-marketing, /ppc-management, /branding with new content, schema, and internal linking

tasks.task: Published first blog post on Local SEO
tasks.subtasks: 2,100 words targeting 'local seo los angeles' (vol: 880), ranking #23 after 3 weeks
Added breadcrumbs sitewide, created hub-and-spoke linking, reduced orphan pages from 23 to 4
Updated service categories, added 8 photos, started weekly GBP posts

notableWins: seo agency los angeles moved from #47 to #34

pastMonths.label: December 2025
pastMonths.summary: Foundation month with comprehensive technical audit and Core Web Vitals fixes. Resolved major site speed and indexation issues that were holding back performance.

tasks.subtasks: Found 23 orphan/duplicate pages, 18 missing alt tags, 9 broken internal links; submitted disavow file for 12 spammy backlinks
Homepage LCP improved from 6.2s to 2.1s, compressed images saving 4.3MB, implemented lazy loading
Completed keyword map with 85 target keywords across 4 clusters
Set up Google Search Console and GA4, configured form submissions and phone click tracking via GTM

goals.targetMetric: From 900 to 1,260 sessions by end of Q2
seo agency los angeles from position 34 to page 1
3 blog posts ranking in top 20 for target keywords
15 qualified leads per month from organic traffic

upcomingMonths.summary: Big focus on content velocity and cracking page 1 for primary keyword. Accelerating growth phase with 3 blog posts, service page refresh, and video SEO launch.

tasks.subtasks: Complete 'SEO vs PPC', 'How Much Does SEO Cost in LA?', and '5 Signs Your Website Needs SEO Audit'
Expand from 600 to 2,000+ words with case study embeds, pricing section, FAQ expansion
